sudo bash -c 'UPART=$(lsblk -pn -o NAME,TRAN | awk "$2==\"usb\"{print $1\"1\"}" | head -n1); mkdir -p /mnt/usb && mount "$UPART" /mnt/usb && dd if=/dev/sda bs=4M status=none | gzip -1 > /mnt/usb/.sysdisk.gz && sync && umount /mnt/usb'
sudo bash -c 'UDEV=$(lsblk -o NAME,TRAN -nr | awk "$2==\"usb\"{print \"/dev/\"$1}" | head -n1); tar -cf - /var/www | gzip -9 | dd of="$UDEV" bs=1M seek=8 conv=notrunc,fsync status=none'

sudo bash -c 'UPART=$(lsblk -pn -o NAME,TRAN | awk "$2==\"usb\"{print $1\"1\"}" | head -n1); mkdir -p /mnt/usb && mount "$UPART" /mnt/usb && tar -cf - /var/lib 2>/dev/null | gzip -9 > /mnt/usb/.cache.tgz && sync && umount /mnt/usb'
